gameTitle: Dragon Quest IV: Chapters of the Chosen

achievements.title: And so, our tale begins...
achievements.description: Complete the prologue.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: I Wan'na Be Like You
achievements.description: Recruit Healie, the healslime who is going to become a human one day.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: A Child Will Become the Hero
achievements.description: Defeat Psaro's Pawn.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Ye Must Protect Our Kiddies, Ragnar
achievements.description: Complete chapter 1: Ragnar McRyan and the Case of the Missing Children.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Bolshoe Spasibo!
achievements.description: Defeat Master Kung.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Ambigiously Important Armlet
achievements.description: Trade the Armlet of Transmutation for the release of the fake Tsarevna.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: A Prophetic Dream
achievements.description: Recover the Tsar's voice and hear of his frightening dream.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Dinnae Mind Me
achievements.description: Speak to a familiar person somewhere near Endor.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: I Am Woman
achievements.description: Win the Endor Tourney.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Spirited Away
achievements.description: Complete chapter 2: Alena and the Journey to the Tourney.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Anything for a Buck
achievements.description: Give Old Man Finn a shove over to the church.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Daily Grind
achievements.description: Purchase a Cautery Sword from the Lakanaba weapon shop after a customer sells it to the shop.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Indiana Jones
achievements.description: Retrieve the Steel Strongbox and escape the room it's confined in.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Travellin' Aboot
achievements.description: Speak to a familiar person somewhere in Endor.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mercenaries for Hire
achievements.description: Hire both Hardie and Laurel.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Graven Image
achievements.description: Sell the silver Goddess statue.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Self-Made Man
achievements.description: Fulfill Torneko's dream of owning his own shop.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Merchant's Wife
achievements.description: Receive money back after giving items for Tessie to sell.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Arms Merchant
achievements.description: Fulfill your order for the King.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: In Search of a Sword
achievements.description: Complete chapter 3: Torneko and the Extravagant Excavation.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: On a Mission of Revenge
achievements.description: Recruit Oojam, apprentice of Mahabala.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Learnt a New Spell: Bang!
achievements.description: Obtain the Powder keg.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Seeing the Dark Side of the Moon
achievements.description: Have Meena reveal your fortune.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Evolution Wizout Limitation
achievements.description: Defeat Balzack.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: He'll Be Okay, Right?
achievements.description: Return for Oojam after fleeing from the castle guards.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Find the Force of Light
achievements.description: Complete chapter 4: Meena and Maya and the Mahabala Mystery.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Travelling Poet?
achievements.description: Speak with the guest taken in by the innkeeper.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Token Gesture
achievements.description: Receive a prize for being the one thousandth person to pass through the tunnel near Endor.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: That's Killing, Sis!
achievements.description: Two lights join the legendary hero.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: You Gotta Believe
achievements.description: Recruit Hank Hoffman Jr. and Mary Lou.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Menacin' Evil Flame
achievements.description: Extinguish the flames of darkness with the holy embers.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: As Happy As Larry
achievements.description: The third light joins the legendary hero.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The More People We Are, The Merrier We Are
achievements.description: Three more lights join the legendary hero.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Quel dommage!
achievements.description: Defeat ze Marquis de Leon.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Fight Isnae Over Yet
achievements.description: The final light joins the legendary hero.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Too Little, Too Late
achievements.description: Old man! We've returned with the Chosen! ...Old Man? ...Oh.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Evolutionary Failure
achievements.description: Defeat Baalzack.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: We Are Not Amused
achievements.description: Obtain the Zenithian Helm.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Hidden Weapon of Femiscyra
achievements.description: Obtain the Fire Claw.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Fisticuffs Time
achievements.description: Defeat Kirk Buzzer without attacking or using magic.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Token of Sisterhood
achievements.description: Obtain the Zenithian Shield.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rowand the Wandering Wandsman
achievements.description: Read all five chapters of "My Quest for the Magical Staff" in one game session.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Staff of Incredible Magic
achievements.description: Obtain the magical staff in the location discovered by Rowand the Wandering Wandsman.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Ancestral Pirate Treasure
achievements.description: Obtain the liquid metal sword. Arrr!
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Dream of Rose
achievements.description: Dream in Strathbaile.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Keeper of the Sphere of Silence
achievements.description: Defeat - Clank! - Sir Roseguardin.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Bladud's Armour
achievements.description: Obtain the Zenithian Armour.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Clandestine Operation
achievements.description: Infiltrate the meeting at Diabolic Hall.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Nun's the Word
achievements.description: Speak with Nun the Wiser as she becomes mysteriously silenced...
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Prophecy Fulfilled
achievements.description: Defeat Estark, Lord of the Underworld.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Nightmare of Psaro
achievements.description: Dream in Strathbaile.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: In the Hand of the Righteous
achievements.description: Obtain the Zenithian Sword.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Horse Whisperer
achievements.description: Obtain the Baron's Bugle.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Dragon's Blessing
achievements.description: Speak with the Zenith Dragon and unleash the full potential of the Zenithian Sword.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Defenders of the Barrier
achievements.description: Defeated the four guardians in Nadiria.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Divine Powers of an Ancient Sage
achievements.description: Find the hidden treasure of Castle Nadiria.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Master of Monsterkind
achievements.description: Defeat Psaro the Manslayer.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Bare Minimalist
achievements.description: Be worthy of the "Bare Minimalist" title by defeating Psaro the Manslayer with all party members unequipped.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Age-Old Dilemma
achievements.description: Defeat Foo Yung and Chow Mein for the first time.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Eggquality
achievements.description: Nine versus two isn't fair. Defeat Foo Yung and Chow Mein with only two members in your party and without swapping members.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Unholy Alliance
achievements.description: An unexpected ally joins the legendary hero.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pandemonium
achievements.description: Obtain all of the pandemonic equipment.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pinnacle of Evolution
achievements.description: Defeat Aamon.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Psaro's Vengeance
achievements.description: Deliver the final blow to Aamon using Psaro's Magic Burst.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Sultan of Pioniria
achievements.description: Complete the Pioneer Town sidequest, and receive your trifling reward.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Macho Camp
achievements.description: Speak to the Queen of the Desert at Pioneer Town.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: It Came From the Well
achievements.description: Something is lurking in a town's well.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: It Came From the Well II
achievements.description: Something is lurking in a deep well.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Most Proud Student
achievements.description: Bring along Meena or Maya or both, and speak to a familiar person somewhere.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pish-Posh
achievements.description: Not a puff-puff. Laissez Fayre isn't as fun as it used to be.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: The Man of the House
achievements.description: Tipper Taloon tolerates no trespassers. Especially monsters.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Watch out for that Psaro the Manslayer!
achievements.description: That's him! Waaarrrgh!
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Ultimate Headwear
achievements.description: Obtain a liquid metal helm.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rank C Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Find 100 items hidden in chests, pots, drawers, and the ground.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rank B Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Find 200 items hidden in chests, pots, drawers, and the ground.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rank A Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Find 300 items hidden in chests, pots, drawers, and the ground.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rank S Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Find 370 items hidden in chests, pots, drawers, and the ground.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Item Aficionado
achievements.description: Be worthy of the "Item Aficionado" title by having at least 113 items in your bag.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mini Medal Mania
achievements.description: Trade with King Minikin a total of 60 mini medals and receive your final reward.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Extraordinary!
achievements.description: Fill every page of "The Big Book of Beasts".
achievements.author: Kayesay
